proposal1.heroHeadline: 8bit is losing over $30,000 annually on manual proposals. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Crafting each proposal by hand takes hours. Our system does it in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: For 8bit, each problem below is a direct hit to efficiency and revenue.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: 8bit spends over 150 hours annually on proposal creation. That's time not spent on client work or closing new deals.

problems.title: Inconsistency Costs
problems.description: Without a streamlined process, proposal quality varies. Each inconsistency risks losing a potential client.

problems.title: High Opportunity Cost
problems.description: Every hour spent on proposals is an hour not spent enhancing SEO strategies for clients. This results in lost revenue opportunities.

problems.title: Client Drop-Off
problems.description: Delayed proposals can result in losing client interest. Every day a proposal is late can cost a potential contract.

problems.title: Brand Misalignment
problems.description: Manually created proposals can miss the mark on 8bit's branding. This misalignment can confuse clients and cost deals.

problems.title: Resource Overload
problems.description: With only 4 team members, time spent on proposals is a strain. It diverts critical resources from project execution.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Introducing a solution that replaces all inefficiencies with speed and precision.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours. Our system slashes this to under a minute, freeing up your team.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistent proposals confuse clients. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with 8bit's brand.

solutions.title: Enhanced Focus
solutions.description: Time is wasted on repetitive tasks. With automation, focus shifts back to client strategy and service delivery.

solutions.title: Real-Time Insights
solutions.description: Currently, tracking proposal engagement is manual. Our system provides instant feedback on client interactions.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: Small teams are stretched thin with manual work. Automation reallocates resources to high-impact areas.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for 8bit's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for 8bit around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for 8bit.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Turn Every Click Into a Customer with 8bit's Cutting-Edge Solutions.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our tailored approach will optimize your digital presence, ensuring conversions and growth. Let's transform your business together.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently losing potential revenue due to missed digital opportunities.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Visitors are leaving before engaging, resulting in a 40% loss in potential leads. This significantly impacts your sales pipeline.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Optimization
problems.description: With 50% of traffic coming from mobile, an unoptimized site means losing half of your audience. That's half the potential revenue gone.

problems.title: Ineffective SEO
problems.description: Low search engine rankings mean you're missing out on 70% of organic traffic. This is a major revenue loss.

problems.title: Slow Load Times
problems.description: Every second of delay in load time results in a 7% decrease in conversions. This directly impacts your bottom line.

problems.title: Inadequate Analytics
problems.description: Without proper data insights, you're missing out on understanding customer behavior, leading to a 30% inefficiency in marketing spend.

problems.title: Lack of Brand Engagement
problems.description: Without engaging content, you're losing customer loyalty, resulting in a 25% drop in repeat business.

proposal2.solutionIntro: 8bit's solutions directly address these losses, transforming them into growth opportunities.

solutions.title: Website Optimization
solutions.description: Revamp your site for speed and engagement, reducing bounce rates and increasing conversions.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: Ensure seamless mobile experiences to capture and convert the growing mobile audience.

solutions.title: SEO Enhancement
solutions.description: Boost your search rankings to capture a larger share of organic traffic, driving more potential leads.

solutions.title: Data Analytics
solutions.description: Implement robust analytics to gain insights into your audience, optimizing marketing efforts.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: At 8bit, we blend creativity with technical expertise to drive your success.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Track Record
whyUsCards.description: We have a history of transforming digital experiences that lead to real business growth.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric
whyUsCards.description: Your goals are our goals. We tailor solutions to meet your specific needs.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach
whyUsCards.description: We work closely with you, ensuring transparency and alignment every step of the way.

whyUsCards.title: Technical Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team is skilled in the latest technologies, ensuring your business stays ahead of the curve.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team that makes it all happen.

team.name: Matthew Schroeder
team.bio: Matthew leads strategy and client relationships with a passion for innovation and excellence.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: Understand your business and set clear goals.

process.title: Design & Development
process.description: Create engaging and functional digital assets.

process.title: Testing & Optimization
process.description: Ensure everything works perfectly before launch.

process.title: Launch & Support
process.description: Go live with continued support and optimization.

pricing.description: Ideal for small businesses looking to optimize their digital presence.

pricing.description: Comprehensive solution for growing businesses. Recommended for best value.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's chat about how we can help you achieve your goals without any pressure.
